title: ranunculus sublinearis
intro: Ranunculus sublinearis, also known as the Sublinear Ranunculus, is a species of flowering plant in the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). It is native to the mountainous regions of the western United States and has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant's roots, leaves, and flowers have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations, providing relief from pain and inflammation. The herbal preparations of Ranunculus sublinearis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used internally or applied topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
